text:
The Scar is the 41st episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

Wrath and Sloth confront Ed as he tries to save the people of Liore. In the heart of the city, Scar, Kimbley and Al fight a battle that none of them may survive.

Trivia

This episode has adapted content from Chapter 30: The Truth Inside the Armor.
This is the final episode of the third season.
